people.name: Kassymbek Zhenis Mahmuduly
people.career:
Born in Zhambyl region in 1975. Graduated from the Kazakh State Academy of Architecture and Construction, and later from Gumilyov Eurasian State University with a degree in Public Administration.
Career experience includes work at the Kazakh State Academy of Architecture and Construction, the Antimonopoly Policy Committee, transport and communications authorities, Aktau International Sea Commercial Port, and ministerial leadership roles. He later served as Deputy Prime Minister of Kazakhstan, Akim of Karaganda region, and since December 08, 2022 as Akim of Astana.

people.name: Otebayev Yersin Kenzhebayevich
people.responsibilities: Fuel and energy complex and utilities, construction, municipal services, transport and roads.

people.name: Yeshkeyev Daulat Zatovich
people.position: Chief of Staff of the Astana Akim's Office
